feed.title: AO3 - Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Hiding with the animals
entry.summary:
Author: Dev_Hum4n

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,298Chapters: 2/20Kudos: 1

Summary: In a world where hybrids are known of—but never truly seen—Bruce Wayne never expected one to be so close to home. As secrets begin to surface, he’s forced to confront a hidden truth: the people he loves most may not be entirely human. And in Gotham, being different has never been safe. Therefore, he must try and protect them from everything they’ve been through, even though he knows it’s going to be extremely difficult.

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 100,544Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 55

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore. i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

entry.title: The Madness He Chose
entry.summary:
Author: Andromeda_Child

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,049Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: She is not something that happened to him. She is something he walked toward, eyes open, cape trailing, every careful rule he built himself on crumbling at the sound of her laugh. She blows up buildings and he pulls her from the rubble. She kisses him like a threat and he lets her. She is Gotham's worst joke and his best-kept secret, and somewhere between the rooftops and the wreckage, Bruce Wayne stopped pretending he wanted her to stop. A collection of one-shots. Dark. Electric. Occasionally tender in ways neither of them would admit to.

entry.title: Batman And Harley Quinn Under The Red Hood.
entry.summary:
Author: Jakebob555

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,192Chapters: 3/20Kudos: 2

Summary: One year post the Funeral of Jason Todd Bruce Wayne and Harleen Quinzel's friendship is going strong. With the former Clown Princess of Crime now out of Arkham and attempting to return to Civilian Life. Elsewhere Tim Drake continues training under Bruce to take on the mantle of Robin, things take a dark turn though when a new foe taking up the name and mantle of the Red Hood appears on the streets of Gotham hunting down members of the Joker's gang as well as the local Drug Trade. Who is this mysterious new Vigilante and why does he seem to know Batman?

entry.title: Our Monkey, Our Circus
entry.summary:
Author: gardenfire45

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,076Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 169

Summary: Alfred wants the Batfamily to get along, So Bruce made a Groupchat hoping everyone to behave. (He put too much hope into it, no one is behaving). It end up as we all expected, Chaos... At least it's entertaining...  -   Harleen: Monkeys are terrifying creature ngl Harleen: did you know Chimpanzees rips off the balls of their rivals or enemy? Harleen: gruesome shit.   Jason: You learn new things every day   Tim: I do not need to read that at fucking 10 pm in patrol night.   Steph: Humans can do it too if they're not a coward or afraid to be called gay Steph: but people are cowards, Start ripping off the enemies balls!!! Be the dominant Chimpanzees!!!   Cass: on it.

entry.summary:
Author: LocustPocus

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,839Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 101

entry.title: Cursed Child
entry.summary:
Author: J4YYYZ

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,346Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 618

Summary: Bruce gets de-aged into a 16-year old after being hit by an alien weapon from an attempted invasion. The 16 year old who trained under the LOA.The 16 year old who ran away from Alfred.The 16 year old who was manipulated into something else.The 16 year old who was made a weapon.The 16 year old who never had a childhood. Bruce tries to forget the days of when he trained under Ra's, but small habits and reflexes he thought were long gone start to resurface, along with memories being freshly remembered as if it was yesterday. It haunts him slowly, eating him out from the inside before taking action after playing with its food. EDIT: currently being rewritten. Read chapter notes to see what is and what isn’t. Sorry for the confusion, i thought it was clear when it was just the notes.

entry.title: Intentional Child Acquisition for Dummies
entry.summary:
Author: natcat5

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,517Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 772

Summary: After returning from a parallel universe where he was a father of 6+, Bruce Wayne attempts to find all of his children before his mother loses patience and takes matters into her own hands.

entry.title: Not-So-Solitary
entry.summary:
Author: girlbrainiac

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,849Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 392

Summary: After a mis-aimed batarang throw, Batman managed to hold onto the Red Hood in the subsequent explosion. Fearing that he could lose his son again, Bruce keeps Jason locked in the Bat Cave. Jason is exactly where he never wanted to be: stuck in a glass case amidst a colony of Bats he swore he wanted nothing to do with ever again. More annoying than that, though, they refuse to leave him alone or stop talking to him. Sheesh. Now he almost wished they'd sent him to Arkham. ...Almost.

entry.title: What If Bruce got Hit by Magic...
entry.summary:
Author: sunnyhalfsugar

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,476Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 204

Summary: ...And it projects his thoughts out loud like a reverse mind reading? Beware, for you're about to learn the intimate, unfiltered thoughts of the Dark Knight. Featuring: emotional damage, secondhand embarrassment, and Bruce Wayne having zero thoughts about himself.   Warning: 80% of Bruce’s brain is just “my babies :)”

entry.title: Quarantine: Batfamily Edition
entry.summary:
Author: AJwarrior

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,671Chapters: 4/10Kudos: 95

Summary: Dick's got hidden trauma, Jason doesn't know how to deal with his own death, Cass wants to be safe, Tim overworks himself, Steph has mommy issues (and daddy issues, and other issues), Duke feels out of place, and Damian can't figure out how to connect. They've all got problems. Bruce is so tired. Pair all of that with a Lockdown, and Gotham's finest vigilantes are going to need a lot of hot cocoa and slumber parties to get through this one. ---- The batfamily deals with quarantine. Forced into proximity with each other, Bruce and his kids get into various shenanigans, heart-to-hearts, and movie nights, while also dealing with a very different Gotham than the one they are used to.

entry.title: Dearest Mother of Mine
entry.summary:
Author: FeelingtheAster

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,277Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Vivian is trying to figure out what in the world her husband and his children are doing for Mother's Day if they're all orphans.Don't have to read the OG series to understand, but I recommend it because it's goated and top tier and amazing.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I survived, but what for?
entry.summary:
Author: ThisIsNotTheWriterYouAreLookingFor

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,141Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 13

Summary: On that faithful day in Ethiopia Batman was not late to save Robin. Little did he guess that this would just be the start of a long journey full of misery and heart ache, that at the end, it all may have been worth it… But not so necessary.   a.k.a. Bruce saves Jason, but that forces him to come to the terms of his own demons, in order to help Jason with his. And Jason is recovering from the murder attempt, and has a terrible time in the meanwhile.

entry.title: a blackbird at my door, singin' nevermore
entry.summary:
Author: slightlysmilingface

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,082Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 56

Summary: It starts with Bruce. A child, unformed and scattered. A child that should, in all normal circumstances, be fine. Luck is on his side: he is a boy of privilege, wealth, and one the greatest legacies in America’s history. Bruce is what they are before they crack. Before trauma after trauma after trauma beats them down and wears them out and makes them something… Different. Bruce is not an alter, nor a whole person. He is a child. He is the start. *** Or, Bruce Wayne has dissociative identity disorder.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Ajusshi from Gotham?
entry.summary:
Author: maemae18

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,602Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 36

Summary: Jimmy Fallon just dropped the bombshell of the century: 4K footage of Bruce Wayne's hidden activities in South Korea. While the world is obsessed with the "Mystery Ajusshi," the residents of Wayne Manor are dealing with the horrifying realization that their father has the range of a virtuoso and the footwork of a main dancer. Bruce maintains it was a publicity stunt and nothing more. Jason is already printing the "Hyung" t-shirts. or Bruce Wayne 'had' a Kpop phase that nobody knew about until it was finally released.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Chapter 3; Twilight
entry.summary:
Author: Corvix_Ailuranthrope_4313

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,216Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Safeguard 27 had been a success, The Second Bruce Batman had protected Gotham with everything he had, but nothing lasts forever, including the age of The Second Batman. Now we enter The Twilight of the City. A calm has started to spread over The City, but will it last? Or is something lurking in the dark? Whatever it is, Batman will find it and like the Batmen before him, he will give everything for his City.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Another Perspective
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 93,339Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 534

Summary: A clash of opposing plans causes Batman to accidentally be doused with a hybrid of not-quite-Fear Toxin and Ivy's pheromones. In order to cope with the opposing influences, his brain convinces him that the four Rogues who were keyed to them - Scarecrow, Ivy, Harley Quinn, and Riddler - have been deaged into children. Obviously he'll have to bring them home and look after them until an antidote is made. Meanwhile, by order of the Batkids in order to NOT break Batman's mind, said Rogues are forced to play along.

entry.title: A looped Intention.
entry.summary:
Author: Sleepy_Wolfes

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 156Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: “a new group with the name «MAESTRO» had appear for the last 4 months, tracking down wanted criminals, most are found in the Crime Alley, some are found in their house. The group had left a card with their Logo on it with quote that says: 'eye for an eye and tooth for a tooth', are they an Anti heroes? Or are they are Vigilantes? Until now, the police department had no significant and constant clue.” — MAESTRO, a very new phenomenon that appear 4 months ago At Gotham, the city of Criminals and dampness. How will these turns out?.   Anti Hero are not mine! The series belonged to @Ayano Cchi at YouTube, Tiktok and Insta.More things to be added!.
